hooks.command: powershell -c "$dir=$env:USERPROFILE+'\.claude-fleet\events'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force }; $json='{"event":"stop","session_id":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + '","cwd":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_DIR + '"}'; $json | Out-File $dir+'\'+$env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID+'_'+(Get-Random)+'.json' -Encoding UTF8"

powershell -c "$dir=$env:USERPROFILE+'\.claude-fleet\events'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force }; $json='{"event":"idle","session_id":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + '","cwd":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_DIR + '"}'; $json | Out-File $dir+'\'+$env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID+'_'+(Get-Random)+'.json' -Encoding UTF8"

powershell -c "$dir=$env:USERPROFILE+'\.claude-fleet\events'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force }; $json='{"event":"start","session_id":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + '","cwd":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_DIR + '"}'; $json | Out-File $dir+'\'+$env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID+'_'+(Get-Random)+'.json' -Encoding UTF8"

powershell -c "$dir=$env:USERPROFILE+'\.claude-fleet\events'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force }; $json='{"event":"end","session_id":"' + $env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + '"}'; $json | Out-File $dir+'\'+$env:CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID+'_'+(Get-Random)+'.json' -Encoding UTF8"
